description_long: This bollard is a tall, slender post with a cylindrical body and a wide, circular base for stability. The upper section features a distinct, horizontally ribbed or louvered panel, likely designed for visibility or to house a reflective or illuminated element. The main shaft is smooth and uniform in color, contrasting with the lighter, textured upper portion. The base appears robust and slightly flared, ensuring the bollard remains upright and secure when mounted. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for controlling vehicle or pedestrian access in urban environments such as sidewalks, parking lots, or park entrances. The cap is flat and squared off, matching the clean, functional aesthetic of the bollard.
description: A tall, cylindrical bollard with a wide circular base and a ribbed, lighter-colored upper section for visibility or illumination. The design is utilitarian and robust, ideal for urban access control.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ribbed upper section and the full width of the circular base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and the transition between the smooth shaft and ribbed upper section.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the ribbed upper section and wide base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the clear distinction between the shaft and upper section.
